seoTitle: Widgelli vs Wilbetree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Widgelli and Wilbetree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Widgelli and Wilbetree.
heading: Widgelli vs Wilbetree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Widgelli, New South Wales and Wilbetree, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilbetree has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Widgelli (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Widgelli or Wilbetree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Widgelli has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Wilbetree scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Widgelli scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Wilbetree scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Widgelli or Wilbetree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilbetree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
